data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a recording option being enabled. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of this feature. The linked use case mentions a recording option but does not provide sufficient evidence to demonstrate that it is implemented or operational, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the recording option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
